CREATE.THEME.HINT: The other properties such as colors and fonts are taken from the current Theme.

MESSAGE.THEME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A Theme with that name already exists
MESSAGE.NOK: An error has occurred. The Theme was not created.

DELETE.LABEL: Delete
DELETE.THEME_MESSAGE: Do you want to delete this Theme?
DELETE.MESSAGE_INFO_OPERATOR: This Theme was created by automation. It is deletable but it will be recreated by automation.
DELETE.MESSAGE_REJECT_MANDATORY: The Theme is marked as required for operation and therefore cannot be deleted.
DELETE.MESSAGE_REJECT_DELETION: The Theme is used by Workspaces and therefore cannot be deleted.
DELETE.MESSAGE_CHECK_USE: Checking the usage of the Theme in Workspaces...
DELETE.MESSAGE_TIMEOUT: It took too long to determine the usage of the Theme. The operation was aborted.

MESSAGE.NOK: An error has occurred. The Theme was not changed.

EXPORT.LABEL: Export
EXPORT.EXPORT_THEME_FAIL: An error occurred, the Theme was not exported.

INTERNAL.MANDATORY_TRUE: This Theme is required for operation. Therefore, it cannot be deleted.
INTERNAL.OPERATOR_MESSAGE: This Theme was created by automation. All changes will be lost during the next deployment.

TOOLTIPS.CREATION_USER: Name of the user of the creation
TOOLTIPS.MODIFICATION_USER: Name of the user of the last change
TOOLTIPS.MANDATORY: If set then this Theme is required for operation and therefore the Theme cannot be deleted.
TOOLTIPS.OPERATOR: If set, the Theme can be deleted or changed, but it will be restored during the next deployment.

HEADER.DETAIL: Display and editing of the Theme properties

AUTO_APPLY.LABEL: Auto apply changes
AUTO_APPLY.MESSAGE: All changes (font, colors) are automatically applied to the current page.
AUTO_APPLY.TOOLTIP: If this option is switched on, then all changes (font, colors) are automatically applied to the current page.
AUTO_APPLY.CURRENT_THEME: Changes are applied immediately upon saving, as this is the currently used theme.

TABS.EXTRAS.TOOLTIP: Additional properties of the Theme (Fonts, Iconsets etc.)
TABS.USE.TOOLTIP: List of Workspaces using the Theme

WORKSPACES_USING_THEME.MISSING_COMPONENT: Information on using the Theme in a Workspace could not be obtained.
WORKSPACES_USING_THEME.USED: The Theme is used by the following Workspaces:
WORKSPACES_USING_THEME.UNUSED: The Theme is not used by any Workspace.

UPLOAD.NOK: The file was not uploaded successfully.

CONSTRAINT.FILE_TYPE: The following image formats are accepted: jpg, jpeg, png, svg
CONSTRAINT.FILE_TYPE.FAVICON: The following image formats are accepted: jpg, jpeg, ico, png, svg
CONSTRAINT.NAME: Please add a Workspace name before uploading a file.
CONSTRAINT.SIZE: The image file size exceeds the maximum length of 100,000 bytes.

TOOLTIPS.LOGO_SMALL: Logo - reduced size, e.g. for use in slim menu
TOOLTIPS.URL: As an alternative to uploading, a URL to an image can be specified here.

IMPORT.IMPORT_THEME_FAIL: An error occurred, the Theme was not imported.
IMPORT.NAME_HINT_MESSAGE: First select a file. You can adjust the names and upload the file if there are no errors.
IMPORT.NAME_EXISTS_MESSAGE: A Theme with this name already exists. Its definition is overwritten.
IMPORT.DISPLAY_NAME_EXISTS_MESSAGE: A Theme with this display name already exists. Importing is possible, but it will result in Themes with the same display name.

TEMPLATE.SELECTOR.TOOLTIP: Choose an existing Theme and use their values (e.g. colors, fonts, etc.) in current Theme.

CONFIRMATION.MESSAGE: Should all values (colors, fonts, etc.) be replaced by the values of "{{ITEM}}"?
CONFIRMATION.OK: Values were replaced. Please save the Theme to apply the changes.

TOOLTIPS.ID: Unique technical ID of the Theme
TOOLTIPS.NAME: Unique name of the Theme, cannot be changed. Used as reference to the Theme.
TOOLTIPS.FONT_FAMILY: Used font family (CSS property: font-family), e.g. 'Arial', 'Times New Roman', etc.
TOOLTIPS.FONT_SIZE: Used basic font size (CSS property: font-size), e.g. '16px', '1em', etc.
TOOLTIPS.ITEM_COLOR_PICKER: Select a color with the color picker
TOOLTIPS.MANDATORY: The Theme is required for operation.

ERRORS.FORM_INVALID: The form data are not ready to save the Theme.
ERRORS.IMPORT_GENERAL_ERROR: Parse error: The file content seems not in JSON format. Please check the file and try again.
ERRORS.IMPORT_CONTENT_ERROR: Parse error: The contained structure does not match the expected format. Please check the file and try again.
ERRORS.PATTERN_ERROR: Your input does not match the required pattern
ERRORS.FILETYPE_PATTERN_ERROR_1: Your file does not match the allowed filetype: .ico
ERRORS.FILETYPE_PATTERN_ERROR_2: Your file does not match the allowed filetypes: .png, .jpg, .jpeg

ENDPOINT.NOT_EXIST: Routing not possible because target is not configured correctly. Application: {{product}}, Endpoint: {{endpoint}}

HTTP_STATUS_0.THEME: Unknown problem retrieving Theme data - please try again.

HTTP_STATUS_400.THEME: Your request could not be processed.

HTTP_STATUS_401.THEME: You are not authorized to see Themes.

HTTP_STATUS_403.THEME: You have no permissions to see Themes.

HTTP_STATUS_500.THEME: Unknown server problem retrieving Theme data - please try again.
